items.title: Debugging and testing loop: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Debugging means making plausible edits until the visible failure disappears, without preserving a failing test.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Use observations to test one hypothesis at a time and keep the smallest exposing case as a regression test after the cause is repaired.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Use observations to test one hypothesis at a time and keep the smallest exposing case as a regression test after the cause is repaired.
